overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European city at dusk. The character traverses cobblestone streets, passes through stone archways, walks along elevated pathways with scenic city views, and explores market areas with timber-framed buildings and vendor stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street ascending to stone archway

events.description: Geralt enters the large stone archway, transitioning from open street to covered passage

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily uphill on cobblestones toward a large stone archway entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green dress walking toward the archway
pedestrian in brown cloak walking alongside the wall

entered.detail: large medieval stone archway entrance with heavy wooden doors
uneven cobblestone road surface sloping uphill
tall stone building with arched windows and weathered texture
low stone wall with cylindrical caps running along left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cobblestone street sloping upward toward a large stone archway. Geralt walks steadily uphill as a few pedestrians move in the opposite direction. The scene is set at dusk with overcast skies, and the architecture features historic stone buildings with a low parapet wall on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with timber-framed merchant buildings

events.description: exits the stone archway into an open elevated street with timber-framed buildings
turns left along the elevated walkway, following the curve of the building

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the elevated street past timber-framed buildings and a wooden cart, accompanied by other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC in red vest and white shirt walking alongside Geralt
pedestrian pushing a wooden cart along the street

entered.detail: half-timbered building with yellow plaster infill and dark wooden beams
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked on the cobblestones
tall stone chimney stack with multiple pots

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the archway onto an elevated walkway lined with timber-framed buildings. The street curves gently left, revealing more of the historic architecture. Pedestrians walk alongside, including one pushing a wooden cart. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural dusk and warm glow from building windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: Geralt stops walking and approaches the stone parapet to look out over the city
after viewing the city, Geralt turns around to walk back toward the street

agents.ego_description: Geralt stops at the stone parapet to observe the city skyline and setting sun before turning back

entered.detail: panoramic view of distant city rooftops with smoking chimneys
low orange sun visible through hazy overcast sky

segments.scene_description: At the scenic overlook, Geralt stops to gaze out over the city skyline as the sun sets through the haze. The view reveals distant rooftops and smoking chimneys beyond the stone parapet. After a moment of observation, the character turns to walk back toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with vendor stalls and dark archway

events.description: enters market area with red-roofed vendor stalls and increased pedestrian activity
enters darker shaded area approaching the stone archway, lighting becomes dimmer

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the market area past vendor stalls and other pedestrians, heading toward a dark archway

notable_agents.action: vendor in green dress standing at a market stall
pedestrian in dark clothing with hat walking toward camera

entered.detail: wooden market stall with red and white striped awning displaying goods
wooden scaffolding structure against a building facade
shadowed stone tunnel entrance leading to darker interior

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks back through a bustling market area with red-roofed vendor stalls and timber scaffolding. The lighting grows darker as the character approaches a shadowed stone archway. Pedestrians move through the narrow cobblestone street, and the atmosphere shifts to a more enclosed, intimate market setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sloping cobblestone street that opens into an elevated walkway lined with historic architecture. It begins with Geralt walking steadily uphill toward a large stone archway under overcast dusk skies, passing pedestrians beside stone buildings and a low parapet wall. As he emerges through the archway, the environment shifts to a higher vantage point where the street curves gently left. The scene then expands to reveal timber-framed buildings and a pedestrian pushing a wooden cart, while the lighting transitions from the gray of twilight to a warm glow emanating from the building windows.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, hazy city overlook into the enclosed, shadowed depths of a bustling market district. It begins with Geralt pausing at a stone parapet to gaze across a skyline of distant rooftops and smoking chimneys under a setting sun. As the character turns away from the vista, the perspective shifts from the open horizon back toward the city streets. The scene then transitions into a crowded market area filled with red-roofed vendor stalls and timber scaffolding, where the light gradually dims. Finally, the camera follows the character through the narrow cobblestone street as the atmosphere grows more intimate, moving toward a shadowed stone archway.
